Author: dajoey
Name: AutoPotion
Description: Automatically uses the highest-tier HP potion in your inventory at a configurable HP threshold. In deep dungeons, also auto-uses the dungeon's regen potion (Sustaining / Eurekan / Orthos / Pilgrim's) at its own threshold.
Punchline: Auto-uses HP and deep dungeon potions at configurable HP thresholds.
